en: Let's make it quick. Ready, boys? Look, chaps, it is going to be playback.
Lip-sync's all that's required. We do know how to play our instruments.
ko: 우리는 악기를 연주할 줄 압니다. 립싱크를 하라고요?

en: You want me to lip-sync? I don't understand why we can't simply perform live.
ko: 왜 그냥 라이브로 공연할 수 없는지 이해가 안 돼요. 관객은 차이를 모를 거예요.

en: The audience will never know the difference. We'll know the bloody difference.
This is the BBC. That's how things are done around here, all right? Don't be a nuisance.
ko: 여기서는 이렇게 하는 거예요, 알겠죠? 귀찮게 굴지 마세요.

en: Freddie, it'll be great. Oh, my. You just have to make sure no-one's looking at your lips.
ko: 누군가 당신의 입술을 보지 않도록 해야 해요.

en: Well, the way things are done, we're a load of bollocks, old chap. This is the BBC.
ko: 이렇게 하는 건 말도 안 돼요, 친구. 이건 BBC입니다.

en: I'm relieved. You would be. No, perfect performance.
Number two. Only above the waist.
Camera up. Camera two. No-one wants to see this one.
